case_title: SPENCER SANDRA VS BRESLIN PETER (A-1 TRANSFER)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-24-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-08-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPENCER SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRESLIN PETER  (A-1 TRANSFER) $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,421.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY SPENCER SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT BRESLIN PETER  (A-1 TRANSFER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-24-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JUN-18-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO A-1 TRANSFER RETURNED SIGNED.
